query:
SELECT
        fc.mime_type as "mime_type!",
        COUNT(*)::BIGINT as "count!: i64"
      FROM nodes n
      JOIN file_contents fc ON fc.node_id = n.id
      WHERE n.owner_user_id = $1
        AND n.deleted_at IS NULL
        AND n.status = 'active'
        AND fc.status = 'active'
      GROUP BY fc.mime_type
      ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
